channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla FSD Finally Reached Europe. Now Speed Limits May Slow Its Expansion
item.description: Sweden has a problem with FSD breaking the speed limit on demand,

item.title: Jefferies Lowers Tesla Target and Highlights Potential SpaceX Tracking Stock Risk
item.description: Jefferies has reduced its price target on Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to $375 and identified what it sees as an emerging structural risk for shareholders: the possibility that expectations surrounding a future combination with SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) could cause Tesla shares to increasingly trade as a proxy...

item.title: Jefferies sees downside risk for Tesla stock, warns of SpaceX tracker risk
item.description: Investing.com - Jefferies has trimmed its Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) price target to $375 and flagged a new structural risk for the stock: that growing market consensus around a Tesla-SpaceX merger could effectively transform TSLA shares into a de facto SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) tracking stock.

item.title: ACHR Stock Slips Premarket: Archer Aviation CEO Reportedly Pitches Tesla-Like Future For Air Taxis
item.description: The company’s CEO, Adam Goldstein, takes an optimistic outlook on the future of air taxis.

item.title: SpaceX is launching a secret spacecraft that could change how things are made in space
item.description: SpaceX is targeting Tuesday, June 23 for the first flight of Starfall, a reentry capsule the company has developed almost entirely in private. The Falcon 9 launch window opens at 6:43 a.m. ET from Space Launch Complex 40 at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, with a backup window available the sa...

item.title: Musk Effectively Bought Cursor At Half Price In An 'Incredible Deal,' Says Chamath — Tesla-SpaceX Merger Is Next
item.description: He estimated that if SpaceX grows from $1 trillion to $2 trillion, the stock-based deal becomes far cheaper in hindsight.

item.title: Are the three mega-AI IPOs about to break the market?
item.description: SpaceX just had its IPO, with Anthropic and OpenAI both set to launch initial public offerings soon — their collective financial weight threatens to burst the AI bubble

item.title: Elon Musk Just Lifted His Tesla Voting Stake to Nearly 20%. Could a SpaceX Merger Be Next?
item.description: Does consolidating this much control clear the path to the biggest merger in history?

item.title: Cathie Wood Loads Up on SpaceX Stock. She Is Betting Big That Musk’s AI Vision Will Pay Off.
item.description: Cathie Wood’s aggressive buying signals strong confidence in SpaceX, but investors must decide whether Elon Musk’s ambitious AI vision can ultimately justify the company’s lofty valuation.

item.title: Tesla Semi spotted with ground truth validation equipment as launch looms
item.description: The Tesla Semi was spotted mounted with ground truth validation equipment as the company nears its looming launch. The Semi is Tesla’s Class 8 all-electric truck, and has been utilized in its earlier stages by many companies like PepsiCo. and Frito-Lay, who have been using it in a pilot program.

item.title: Tesla Has Only 69 Robotaxis In Texas — But They Are Cheap
item.description: Tesla Inc. is getting lapped in the Texas robotaxi race. The question is whether it matters.

item.title: Tesla plans to sell modular AI data center hardware called ‘Megapod’
item.description: Tesla wants to sell modular AI data center hardware, according to a new trademark application for a product called “Megapod.” The filing describes a complete, self-contained computing system for AI workloads — and it lands less than a year after Tesla killed Dojo, its only in-house AI training co...

item.title: A SpaceX-Tesla Merger Could Manufacture A $5 Trillion Giant: Here's What Prediction Markets Say
item.description: Elon Musk’s next move could be a SpaceX-Tesla merger big enough to challenge Nvidia Corp. for the title of most valuable company on Earth. Just three sessions into its IPO, SpaceX has already surged nearly 50% to roughly $2.6 trillion, leaving Tesla Inc.

item.title: Investors Should Be Highly Skeptical About Elon Musk’s Revenue Targets for SpaceX
item.description: Elon Musk has a number of gigantic accomplishments, but he also has a long history of overpromising and underdelivering.

item.title: Prediction: SpaceX Stock Could Crash by 50% by 2027
item.description: Shares soared on their debut, but it probably won't last.

item.title: Is Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) Among the Best EV Stocks to Invest In According to Hedge Funds?
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is among the Best EV Stocks. On June 17, Reuters reported that the Dutch road authority said about Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces EU FSD Split As Musk Lifts Voting Stake To 20%
item.description: Sweden has urged the EU to block Tesla’s Full Self-Driving rollout unless the feature that lets vehicles exceed speed limits is disabled, as an EU-wide vote approaches. Denmark has tentatively cleared FSD under Dutch regulatory rules, creating a split in European treatment of Tesla’s driver-assis...

item.title: Europe's First 500 kW V4 Supercharger Is Here - And It's in Norway
item.description: submitted by /u/RoamingNorway [link] [comments]

item.title: Can SpaceX Deliver Tesla-Level Returns? The Bull and the Bear Case
item.description: The company's first week on the market was a smashing success.

item.title: Tesla driver says it was on Autopilot before fatal Texas home crash
item.description: A driver told Harris County investigators that his Tesla was on Autopilot before it left a residential road in Katy, Texas, crashed through the brick wall of a home, and killed a 76-year-old woman inside. The crash happened around 8 p.m. Friday in the 21300 block of Rose Hollow Lane, according to...

item.title: Elon Musk Nears 20% Voting Power In Tesla After Exercising Stock Options
item.description: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk gained more than 300 million shares of the EV giant’s stock as part of his 2018 CEO Compensation Award, which takes his voting rights in Tesla to approximately 19.9%. Elon Musk Gains Tesla Shares In a Form 4 filing with the SEC on June 16, Musk exercised his stock options...

item.title: Cybercab Spotted, Colorado
item.description: submitted by /u/Income_Vivid [link] [comments]

item.title: President Trump touts new Air Force One with Musk technology
item.description: President Donald Trump unveiled an upgraded Boeing 747-8 at Joint Base Andrews on June 19, 2026, describing the Qatar-gifted aircraft as an interim Air Force One equipped with advanced communications systems, including Starlink, Elon Musk’s SpaceX satellite internet service. The plane, valued at ...

item.title: Energy Expert: Electric Vehicles Are the ‘Keystone Species’ of the Next Megatrend. Will Tesla’s Stock See Massive Gains?
item.description: On a recent episode of the Catalyst with Shayle Kann podcast themed around the “electric supercycle,” energy investor Andy Lubershein laid out a framework that should reshape how investors think about the EV trade. He argues four building blocks form what he calls the “electro-industrial tech sta...

item.title: Prediction: The SpaceX Lockup Period Will Be an Absolute Train Wreck for Retail Investors
item.description: Despite SpaceX rocketing out of the gate, we're still on track to witness the greatest fleecing of everyday investors in Wall Street's storied history.

item.title: Elon Musk Just Told Investors to Be (Really) Patient With Optimus and Robotaxi
item.description: Elon Musk spent much of Tesla’s Q1 2026 earnings call doing something he rarely does: lowering expectations. The CEO of Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) repeatedly invoked manufacturing physics rather than moonshot timelines, and the centerpiece of his framing was a single line. “Whenever you have an all-new ...

item.title: Each $1 gain in SpaceX stock adds $4.76B to Elon Musk’s net worth. Here’s what $1K, $7K or $15K invested could earn you
item.description: One small step for SpaceX, and one massive leap for Musk.

item.title: A Tesla Model Y Battery Test Looked Bad. Then The Degradation Almost Stopped
item.description: After a sharp early drop, this Tesla Model Y's recent battery health test suggests this mostly fast-charged LFP pack has settled down.

item.title: After Nvidia And Tesla, Trump Confirms Apple Has Agreed To Build Chips With Intel Amid US Manufacturing Push: 'When Was The Last Time...'
item.description: President Donald Trump said that the U.S. lost semiconductor manufacturing to Taiwan and other countries and lauded his efforts to bring chip production back to America. Trump took to Truth Social early Thursday and highlighted the partnerships he facilitated between Intel Corporation, Nvidia Cor...

item.title: Why odds of SpaceX merger with Tesla keep climbing every time the stock shoots up
item.description: But a giant leap for Tesla shareholders could be a rotten move for SpaceX investors.

item.title: Despite All The Smack Talk, Tesla Copied BYD
item.description: Tesla fans criticized BYD electric vehicles for years. Supposedly, they were cheap, boring, and poorly made. However, BYD has grown and grown over the past several years, now produces far more cars than Tesla, and has about the same number of R&D engineers as Tesla has total employees.

item.title: Bernie Sanders vs. Elon Musk: Would Taxing the Rich Actually Save Social Security?
item.description: Senator Bernie Sanders fired off a single sentence on X this month that frames the entire fight over how to keep Social Security solvent: “Today, Elon Musk, a trillionaire, pays the same amount into Social Security as someone making $184,500.” The Vermont independent paired the post with a bill h...

item.title: Wall Street expects Tesla rival to surge 90% despite cash crunch
item.description: Lucid Group has not had an easy stretch. The stock has been battered, and the losses keep piling up. But Wall Street thinks the sell-off is overdone.

item.title: If You'd Invested $10,000 in Tesla 10 Years Ago, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
item.description: The market continues to buy the story that this is an AI, autonomous driving, and robotics enterprise.

item.title: Podcast: we drive Aptera’s solar car, Tesla Cybercab specs revealed, Lucid Cosmos design leaks, and more
item.description: In the Electrek Podcast , we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Jamie’s first drive in Aptera’s solar car, Tesla Cybercab specs revealed, Lucid Cosmos design leak, and more.

item.title: Cathie Wood Makes Bold Tesla Bet, Dumps $77 Million in Roku Shares
item.description: Cathie Wood Snaps Up $35 Million in Snowflake, Slashes Roku Stake

item.title: Tesla gives its biggest signal yet that Cybercab launch is imminent
item.description: Tesla just gave what is perhaps its biggest signal yet that the launch of the Cybercab, its autonomous ride-hailing-geared car, is imminent. The Cybercab has been spotted outside of Gigafactory Texas in massive numbers over the past few days, with hundreds of units being stored on property just d...

item.title: Rivian's CEO Is Taking On Elon Musk In Humanoid Robots
item.description: Rivian Automotive Inc. CEO RJ Scaringe has a plan to put robots on factory floors. He also has $1 billion to back it up.

item.title: Elon Musk challenges Tesla credit rating from Moody’s after SpaceX gets a higher one
item.description: Elon Musk has publicly questioned Moody’s credit assessments following the rating agency’s decision to assign SpaceX a Baa1 investment-grade rating, two notches above Tesla’s Baa3. The comments came amid discussions comparing the two companies’ financial profiles. SpaceX earned its first-time Baa...

item.title: Who's Winning The Robotaxi Race? It's... Complicated
item.description: Every time we think we understand the robotaxi market, another bit of news shakes things up. This week, we got updates from Tesla, Uber, Waymo, Wayve, and Lucid.

item.title: Portable power: new Mitsubishi eK Cross pairs 1500 W plug with sub-$12K price
item.description: Mitsubishi’s Kei-class eK Cross gets a mild facelift for the 2027 model year that combines a body-color front fascia and updated interior tech to give it a fresh look – but the big news is a new 100 V AC power outlet that can draw up to 1500 Watts.

item.title: Tesla Faces Fresh FSD Roadblock in Europe
item.description: Regulators question supervised self-driving speed behavior

item.title: Tesla Gets Cathie Wood Boost as Ark Returns After SpaceX Buy
item.description: Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest funds reiterated their faith in Elon Musk—buying back into Tesla after selling shares last week in a move that looked like it was making room for SpaceX’s mega IPO. A trading notice revealed on Thursday it added 54,815 shares across its ARK Innovation ETF—where the el...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Gets Approval for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) Technology in Denmark
item.description: Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 10 best electric and autonomous driving stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 11, Tesla Inc.

item.title: The Mag 7 Is Irrelevant as the SpaceX Era Begins
item.description: What’s the point of the Magnificent Seven? Investors are wondering if the group still makes following SpaceX’s stellar debut.

item.title: Tesla Hits EU Speed Bump
item.description: Sweden is pushing back on Tesla's self-driving rollout over speed limit concerns.

item.title: Cathie Wood Rotates Into Tesla and Snowflake
item.description: ARK shifts exposure toward growth and cloud

item.title: SpaceX Has a Rapidly Approaching $20 Billion Surprise for Its Shareholders -- and They're Not Going to Be Happy
item.description: A sizable chunk of SpaceX's $75 billion initial public offering (IPO) capital raise is already spoken for.

item.title: Just 4 "Magnificent Seven" Stocks Are Still More Valuable Than SpaceX. Could SpaceX Be a Better Buy Than All of Them?
item.description: SpaceX wasted no time surpassing Amazon, Meta Platforms, and Tesla in market cap.

item.title: The SpaceX Era Is Making the Magnificent Seven Irrelevant
item.description: What’s the point of the Magnificent Seven? Investors are wondering if the group still makes following SpaceX’s stellar debut.
